description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by landscaped greenery and outdoor amenities. The structure features large windows, a spacious balcony with glass railings, and a rooftop garden area. The property includes a swimming pool, several trees, a water tank, and outdoor seating, creating a comfortable and inviting environment. The main building is finished in light-colored materials, with clean lines and geometric forms. The entryway is defined by a prominent gate and a paved driveway, leading to a partially covered terrace. The overall layout emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, balcony, rooftop garden, and landscaped outdoor spaces including a pool and trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the house's main structure, rooftop garden, glass balcony, and a variety of trees and outdoor features including a pool and water tank.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rooftop garden, upper terrace, and the arrangement of trees and outdoor seating behind the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the driveway, terrace, and the pool area with surrounding trees and a water tank.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entryway, large windows, pool, and landscaped garden with trees and outdoor amenities.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a prominent gate, paved steps, and a partially covered terrace; minimalist door design with glass and metal elements
